title: Trivial test improvements
body:
This fixes one spurious failure on macOS, and replaces some panics with an ordinary test failure.

(This is by no means everything necessary to build with unit tests on macOS; that needs also https://github.com/mtrmac/libpod/tree/tests-WIP .)

comments.body:
LGTM, but be warned that our test suite is having a bad week, so I doubt you'll get reasonable results out of our CI.

The current errors do seem halfway reasonable, though - you might have a missing vendor?
